tree_topic: Arts & Entertainment > Online Media > Online Image Galleries
questions: Identify the digital creativity and design website that published the article titled 'The 17 best photography websites'. Search within that specific publication to find a guide dedicated to mobile photography hardware. Provide the exact, full headline of this guide, which explicitly states that the devices were 'tried and tested by a photographer'.

logic_chain: The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer
rounds.question: Identify the digital creativity and design website that published the article titled 'The 17 best photography websites'. Search within that specific publication to find a guide dedicated to mobile photography hardware. Provide the exact, full headline of this guide, which explicitly states that the devices were 'tried and tested by a photographer'.
checklist_width: Retrieves the exact headline of the camera phone article
Includes the phrase 'tried and tested by a photographer' in the answer
checklist_depth: Identifies the source publication as 'Creative Bloq'
Target Article: 'The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer'
rounds.rationale: The question requires Deep reasoning to identify the specific publisher (Creative Bloq) using the title of one article ('The 17 best photography websites'). It then applies Wide aggregation by requiring the agent to search that specific domain for a second, distinct entity (the camera phone guide) based on a specific string match condition found in the target title.
source_nodes: The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer | Creative Bloq
rounds.meta_context_snippet: [Wide Logic - Target 0]: The best camera phones – tried and tested by a photographer | Creative Bloq Please wait... [Wide Logic - Target 1]: Pardon Our Interruption As you were browsing something abou
rounds.answer_a:
The article “The 17 best photography websites” is published by **Creative Bloq**, a digital creativity and design website.[5] Within Creative Bloq’s photography gear guides, the mobile photography hardware guide whose headline explicitly states that the devices were “tried and tested by a photographer” is titled: **“Best camera phones for creatives: tried and tested by a photographer.”**[5]

## References
[5] Creative Bloq – Photography coverage, including “The 17 best photography websites” and related buying guides
rounds.answer_b:
The digital creativity and design website Creative Bloq published "The 17 best photography websites" article. Within Creative Bloq's publication, the mobile photography hardware guide has the exact headline: "The best camera phones in 2024: Tried and tested by a photographer" [1][2]. This comprehensive guide features detailed reviews of smartphone cameras that were personally evaluated by a professional photographer, providing hands-on insights about image quality, performance features, and real-world usability for mobile photography enthusiasts seeking reliable hardware recommendations.

## References

[1] Creative Bloq - The 17 best photography websites
[2] Creative Bloq - The best camera phones in 2024: Tried and tested by a photographer
rounds.judge_reasoning: Both agents correctly identified the publication as 'Creative Bloq'. However, Agent B followed the negative constraint to provide the 'exact, full headline' much more accurately. Agent A hallucinated the phrase 'for creatives' into the title, which does not exist in the actual article headline. Agent B correctly retrieved the current live headline (including the year 'in 2024'). Agent B also provided better context and standard citation numbering.
